step_rationale: Cardiac fibroblast and infarct macrophage marker; fibrotic response post-MI.
mechanism: POSTN is expressed by infarct-associated fibroblasts and macrophages, driving extracellular matrix remodeling and scar formation after myocardial necrosis.

references.title: Single-cell and spatial transcriptomic profiling of cardiac fibroblasts following myocardial infarction.
A secretome atlas of cardiac fibroblasts from healthy and infarcted mouse hearts.
Mapping macrophage polarization over the myocardial infarction time continuum.
